title: Wheat Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)
primary_source: cbi-iran (Annual Review appendix tables) | iran-data-portal-agriculture (SCI Yearbook Wheat-Production.xlsx)
notes: Two independent Iranian primary series, both sourced to the Ministry of Agriculture: CBI Annual Review appendix table (1999-2021, cross-edition-checked across 23 editions) + Iran Data Portal/SCI Yearbook Wheat-Production.xlsx (1977/78-2013/14, extends 22 years earlier than CBI, longest single-crop series found in this hunt). FAOSTAT cross-check: median |diff| 4.8% across 23 overlapping years -- strong agreement.

title: Barley Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)
notes: CBI Annual Review appendix table, Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, 1999-2021 (23 editions, cross-checked). FAOSTAT cross-check: median |diff| 5.0% across 23 years -- strong agreement.

title: Rice Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)
notes: CBI Annual Review appendix table (crop label varies "Rice"/"Rice (paddy)"/"Rice husks" across editions -- same underlying paddy-rice measure). FAOSTAT cross-check: median |diff| 5.8% across 23 years -- strong agreement.

title: Seed cotton, unginned Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)
notes: CBI table reports raw/seed-cotton basis (matches FAOSTAT "Seed cotton, unginned", not ginned lint -- confirmed by magnitude, not just label). FAOSTAT cross-check: median |diff| 8.2% across 23 years -- agreement.

title: Tea leaves Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)

title: Pistachios, in shell Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)
notes: CBI Annual Review appendix table. FAOSTAT cross-check: median |diff| 21.8% across 23 years, non-monotonic (swings both directions, consistent with pistachio alternate-bearing plus year-attribution differences between sources) -- notable divergence, both series kept, not adjudicated.

title: Citrus Fruit, Total Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)
notes: CBI Annual Review appendix table (horticultural section added ~2010 editions onward). FAOSTAT cross-check: median |diff| 33.5% across 12 years, gap widens over time (near 0% in 2010-2013 to 40-65% by 2018-2021) -- large systematic divergence, both series kept, not adjudicated (see iran_primary_agriculture_series/README.md).

title: Meat of chickens, fresh or chilled Production, Iran Official (Ministry of Agriculture Jihad, via CBI Annual Review / SCI Yearbook)
primary_source: cbi-iran (Annual Review Livestock Products table) | iran-data-portal-agriculture (SCI Yearbook)
extends_chart_id: faostat__Meat of chickens, fresh or chilled__production
notes: CBI Annual Review "Livestock Products" table (1996-2022, cross-edition-checked, up to 5x redundant per year) + Iran Data Portal/SCI Yearbook chicken-meat-egg.xlsx (1991,1996,2001-2006 national totals). FAOSTAT cross-check: median |diff| 0.0% across 27 years -- essentially identical.
